text:
Once there was an old owl perched peacefully in an oak tree. Every evening after dusk, the owl would listen attentively to the soft rustle of creatures navigating through the forest darkness. They were nocturnal creatures fond of chatting.

One night, a tiny flutter landed on an owl pellet. It fluttered excitedly.

Owl: Ooooooot!

Fly-away pellet: Birds! Owls!

Owl: Owls!

Fly-away pellet: Owls!

Owl: Owls!

Fly-away owl pellet: Owls!

Owl: Owls?

Fly-away owl pellet: Ow ow Ow!

Owl: Ow!

Fly-away owl pellet: Ow ow?

Owl: Ow?

Fly-away owl pellet: Owowlowlowlowowlowowlowlowolfowlowl!

Owl paused.

Owl thought hard. Perhaps it was an owl?

Owl: Hmm.

Fly-your own owl pellet?

Owl thought again.

Owl: Maybe?

Fly-your own
